summary: Comprehensive sweep of Aether web app (backend + frontend). Backend pytest: 16/16 PASS (previous bugs — brute-force lockout, Stripe status 500 — are FIXED). Frontend: all P0/P1 flows pass — admin login → dashboard with 5000 credits + Founding Builder banner; signup → 100 credits; all 8 sidebar routes navigate without 404/blank; Get Desktop popover renders all 3 builds (windows-x64 / macos-universal / linux-x64) via braidenbarker/aether release URLs; Aether CLI popover renders all 4 builds (darwin-arm64 / darwin-x64 / linux-x64 / windows-x64); MTK action grid (8+ ops) renders; Documentation renders all 3 articles; Buy Credits modal opens from sidebar; User profile popover + Sign Out work; demo banner dismiss persists across navigation; no horizontal overflow at 1024 / 768 / 375 px viewports. Only P2 cosmetic issues remain.

minor.issue: Returns 401 as designed but the bootstrap /me probe fires before login on /login route, causing 3-6 red 401 entries in browser console. Cosmetic — consider guarding the bootstrap fetch behind an existing-cookie check or downgrade the client log.

ui_bugs.issue: At 375px mobile viewport the hero card renders as an extremely narrow vertical column with single-letter wrapping (text 'GET AETHER FOR WINDOWS' stacks letter-by-letter). The grid/flex layout does not collapse to a stacked mobile layout. Looks broken on small screens.

No visible inline validation error rendered for empty-submit or wrong-password attempts (no element matched .error / [class*=error] / [role=alert]). Either errors are missing or styled with non-standard classes. Verify a user-facing error appears (toast OR inline) on wrong credentials and weak/mismatched passwords.
Still present from iteration 1 — Terms of Service / Privacy Policy text clipped due to wide letter-spacing at 1920px sidebar width.

issues: GetDesktopHeroCard does not stack vertically — text wraps to 1 char per line
Footer text overflow as reported in iteration 1

action_items: Add a mobile breakpoint (sm:/md:) to GetDesktopHeroCard so the right-side build panel stacks under the hero text on <640px viewports.

Ensure Login/Signup forms render a visible error element (e.g.

…

) on invalid submit — current implementation produced no DOM error element my selector could find.
Optional: gate the initial /api/auth/me probe behind document.cookie.includes('access_token') so the /login page doesn't fire a 401 in console.
Optional: shrink letter-spacing or widen sidebar so Terms / Privacy footer fits.
critical_code_review_comments: DownloadDesktopButton.jsx and DownloadCliButton.jsx hardcode VERSION='0.1.0' — when CI bumps the release version, both files must be edited. Move to a shared const or read from package.json / env.

DownloadCliButton.jsx line 21: installCmd points at https://get.aether.sh/cli.sh — verify this host actually resolves (likely not provisioned yet; broken curl pipe). Either ship a real install script or point at the GitHub raw URL.
GetDesktopHeroCard responsive layout uses grid without a mobile fallback — confirmed broken at 375px.
/api/auth/me 401 noise on /login: standard fix is to only fetch /me if a session indicator exists (e.g. localStorage flag or non-httpOnly cookie like 'aether.loggedIn').
Pricing page (Pricing.jsx) uses inline tier definitions ({label:'Starter'…}) — duplicates backend PRICING_TIERS. Same drift risk as BuyCreditsModal previously flagged.
Sidebar 'BUY CREDITS' button lacks a stable data-testid (had to fall back to text matcher) — add data-testid="sidebar-buy-credits" for testability.

success_rate.frontend: ≈95% — all P0/P1 pass; 3 P2 cosmetic/validation issues

test_credentials: admin@aether.dev / aether_admin_2026 confirmed working. Signup self-test created ephemeral test_<uuid>@aether.dev users (no cleanup endpoint).
seed_data_creation: None beyond ephemeral signup users created by pytest (no orphan/test data pollution beyond what iteration 1 already created).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All previously-reported backend bugs (brute-force lockout + Stripe status 500) are fixed and verified by /app/backend/tests/test_auth_stripe.py (16/16 pass). Frontend is shippable for desktop viewport; only P2 cosmetic items remain — chiefly (1) GetDesktopHeroCard mobile layout, (2) Login/Signup inline validation error visibility, (3) pre-login /api/auth/me 401 console noise, (4) sidebar footer text clipping. GitHub release URLs are correctly pointed at github.com/braidenbarker/aether/releases/latest/download — actual file resolution will 404 until the maintainer publishes the draft release (per request: verify URLs only, do not resolve).
rca_of_the_issue: GetDesktopHeroCard mobile breakage: the component uses a fixed multi-column grid without responsive breakpoint classes. At <480px the right-hand build column compresses to ~40px width forcing 1-char-per-line wrapping of the title. Fix: add `flex-col md:flex-row` (or `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[1fr_320px]`) to the outer wrapper and re-test at 375px / 414px / 768px.
